episodes.title: Norway | Former PM Jagland attempts suicide after Epstein links revealed
episodes.description:
Former Norwegian Prime Minister Thorbjorn Jagland was hospitalized Tuesday after a suicide attempt amid Epstein-linked corruption investigation. teleSUR
